results.title: TanStack Query
results.description: TanStack Query is a powerful data fetching and state management library for React, Solid, Vue, Svelte, and vanilla JavaScript, simplifying server-state management.

results.title: TanStack Query
results.description: 🤖 Powerful asynchronous state management, server-state utilities and data fetching for the web. TS/JS, React Query, Solid Query, Svelte Query and Vue Query.

results.title: TanStack Query
results.description: TanStack Query is a powerful data fetching and state management library for modern JavaScript applications, simplifying server state management with hooks and utilities.

results.title: TanStack DB
results.description: TanStack DB is a reactive client store that extends TanStack Query with collections, live queries, and optimistic mutations to build super fast, reactive, and consistent applications.

results.title: Jotai TanStack Query
results.description: Jotai TanStack Query is a Jotai extension library that integrates TanStack Query features with Jotai state management for seamless data fetching and state synchronization.

results.title: TanStack Query Angular
results.description: TanStack Query Angular is a data-fetching library for Angular applications that simplifies managing server state, caching, and synchronization with features like queries, mutations, and optimistic updates.

results.title: Convex Dev React Query
results.description: Convex Dev React Query integrates Convex's reactive server-side functions with TanStack Query to provide real-time, never-stale data updates to clients without polling, pushing new results as they become available.

results.title: TanStack Query Firebase
results.description: TanStack Query Firebase provides TanStack Query hooks for integrating with Firebase, simplifying asynchronous tasks with features like automatic caching, synchronization, and error handling.

results.title: TanStack DB
results.description: A reactive client store for building super fast apps on sync

results.title: TanStack Query Vue
results.description: TanStack Query is a data-fetching library that simplifies fetching, caching, synchronizing, and updating server state in web applications, specifically integrated with the Vue framework.

results.title: TanStack Router
results.description: TanStack Router is a router for building React and Solid applications with 100% inferred TypeScript support, nested routing, and flexible data loading.

results.title: Clerk TanStack React Start Quickstart
results.description: This quickstart guide demonstrates how to integrate Clerk, a developer-first authentication solution, with TanStack Start applications for user management and authentication.

results.title: TanStack Table
results.description: TanStack Table is a headless UI library for building powerful and customizable tables in JavaScript frameworks like React, Vue, Solid, and Svelte.

results.title: TanStack Start
results.description: TanStack Start is a full-stack web framework that provides a comprehensive set of tools and features for building robust web applications, including routing, server-side rendering, authentication, and database integrations, primarily for React.

results.title: TanStack Start React
results.description: TanStack Start is a full-stack web framework that provides a comprehensive set of tools and conventions for building robust applications, with this documentation specifically covering its usage and integration with React.

results.title: MobX Tanstack Query
results.description: MobX wrapper for the Tanstack Query Core package, enabling seamless integration of Tanstack Query with MobX state management.

results.title: TanStack AI
results.description: TanStack AI is a powerful, type-safe AI SDK for building AI-powered applications, offering provider-agnostic adapters, multimodal content support, chat completion, streaming, and isomorphic type-safe tools with enhanced TanStack Start integration.

results.title: TanStack AI
results.description: TanStack AI is a powerful, open-source AI SDK providing a unified, type-safe interface across multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, Gemini) with no vendor lock-in, offering tool/function calling and server/client agnostic design.

results.title: TanStack Store
results.description: TanStack Store is an immutable-reactive, framework-agnostic data store with reactive framework adapters, powering the core of many TanStack libraries.

results.title: Tinkerbells Mobx Query
results.description: A library for reactive caching of data requests based on MobX, inspired by Tanstack React Query, providing a declarative way to define queries and mutations, with features like background data loading for WebSockets and testability.

results.title: TanStack Router
results.description: 🤖 Fully typesafe Router for React (and friends) w/ built-in caching, 1st class search-param APIs, client-side cache integration and isomorphic rendering.

results.title: TanStack Form
results.description: TanStack Form is a headless form library for building and managing forms, providing features like validation, dynamic fields, and array handling across different JavaScript frameworks.

results.title: TanStack Start
results.description: TanStack Start is a full-stack React and Solid framework powered by TanStack Router and Vite, offering full-document SSR, streaming, server functions, and bundling for deployable web applications.

results.title: TanStack Pacer
results.description: TanStack Pacer provides framework-agnostic utilities for debouncing, throttling, rate limiting, queuing, and batching to optimize application performance and resource usage with a flexible, type-safe API.

results.title: TanStack Query Svelte
results.description: The @tanstack/svelte-query package offers a first-class API for using TanStack Query with Svelte, simplifying server state management in Svelte applications.

results.title: TanStack Form
results.description: 🤖 Headless, performant, and type-safe form state management for TS/JS, React, Vue, Angular, Solid, and Lit.

results.title: Material React Table
results.description: Material React Table is a powerful React data table library built with Material UI and TanStack Table, offering features like sorting, filtering, editing, and customization for efficient data display.

results.title: Better Auth TanStack
results.description: Tanstack Query hooks for Better Auth, offering enhanced control over request timing, optimistic mutations, and offline caching for authentication.

results.title: Eden Query
results.description: Eden Query integrates Elysia.js backend with TanStack Query for end-to-end type-safe asynchronous state management across frameworks like React and Svelte.

results.title: TanStack Dexie DB Collection
results.description: A library that provides seamless integration between TanStack DB and Dexie.js, enabling local-first persistence with IndexedDB storage, reactive updates, and optimistic mutations for offline-capable applications.
